# Release v1.1.3

Improve documentation with React integration examples and add an automated release script.

---

## Changelog

## [1.1.3] - 2026-05-12

### Added

- React integration example using `useSyncExternalStore` hook in README
- Automated release script (`scripts/publish-release.sh`) for streamlined publishing
- Missing API documentation: `snapshot`, `on`/`off`, `savePlayerMove`, `isFieldSelectedByIndex`, `board` property
- Additional exports in documentation: `GameEvent`, `GameEventMap`, `GameEventPayload`, `PlayerMoveStatus`

### Changed

- Updated basic usage example to use non-deprecated methods (`savePlayerMove` instead of `savePlayerSelection`, `board` property instead of `getBoard`)
- Marked deprecated methods in API table: `savePlayerSelection`, `getBoard`, `isFieldSelected`
- Restructured PUBLISHING.md with Quick Start (Automated) section

[1.1.3]: https://github.com/TenGosc007/t3core/compare/v1.1.2...v1.1.3
